query: SELECT 'skills' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM skills UNION ALL SELECT 'categories', COUNT(*) FROM categories UNION ALL SELECT 'skill_files', COUNT(*) FROM skill_files UNION ALL SELECT 'skill_commits', COUNT(*) FROM skill_commits UNION ALL SELECT 'discussions', COUNT(*) FROM discussions;
